message:
fix: WASM signature mismatches, SQL injection, wrong DO namespace

Critical fixes found during code review:

- fragmentAddStringColumn: add missing offsets param (6→7 args),
  build proper Arrow-style offsets array from length-prefixed input
- fragmentAddBoolColumn: add missing byteCount param (5→6 args),
  pass separate byteCount and rowCount to Zig
- SQL injection: escape single quotes in string filter values,
  escape double quotes in column name quoting, quote projections
- RemoteExecutor.append(): was using QUERY_DO namespace instead of
  MASTER_DO — add masterDoNamespace param to EdgeQ.remote() options
